kwb.smartwater 0.0.0.9000

Get info on the measures supported by kwb.smartwater

Source: R/frontend_helpers.R
get_measure_info.Rd

Get information on the rainwater management measures supported by kwb.smartwater

Usage

get_measure_info(type = character(0), field_name_only = FALSE)

Arguments

type

optional. Vector of character indicating the measure types ("green_roof", "pavement", "trees", "infiltration", "retention") for which to filter the output.

field_name_only

optional. Logical of length one indicating whether or not to return only the "field_name" instead of all info fields per measure

On this page
